nasb.text: For You make him most blessed forever; You make him joyful with gladness in Your presence.

esv.text: For you make him most blessed forever; you make him glad with the joy of your presence.

cnv.text: 你把永遠的福分賜給他， 又使他因與你同在的喜樂歡欣。

ccb.text: 你给他的祝福永无穷尽， 你的同在使他充满喜乐。

csbs.text: 是的，你给他祝福，直到永远， 又使他在你面前喜乐欢悦；
